prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: TWL-HMPE260-KEVLARCORD-BLK-PARENT Product Type: CORD_ROPE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor HMPE 260LB Utility Cord, Black Multipurpose Line Description: The ASR Outdoor 260lb HMPE survival cord is widely used for military, marine, sporting goods and aerospace applications. It has a high tensile strength and rated at a 200lbs breaking strength.

ASR Outdoor HMPE specialty cordage is a very durable cord for use in extreme conditions, made from braided high molecular polyethylene material. It is lightweight, has a low-stretch and UV resistant making it ideal for survival kits, bug out bags, emergency use and everyday edc situations. ASR Outdoor survival cord can be rapidly deployed when compared to tradition 550 paracord and is significantly smaller and lighter - while still being strong enough to count on in an emergency.

The ASR Outdoor utility cord is made in the USA; constructed from 3 strands of HMPE thread braided together and coated in a proprietary protective coating giving added abrasion and UV resistance. ASR Outdoor cord is heat-resistant, allowing it to be used as a cutting tool for sawing wood, ropes, flex-cuffs while functioning as a perimeter trip line that will not be seen on night vision goggles.

Weighing less than a few ounces, the survival cord is optimal for building emergency shelters, repairing your gear, trip wire, traps, bows, and snares. This cord is the perfect companion to every emergency kit and ideal for every day carry, edc.

Available in multiple lengths. Colors available: Black Search Terms: survival emergency campsite perimeter alarm trip wire rope every day carry edc kevlar booby trap signaling device tactical bug out bag survival cord kite braided spear fishing line specialty braided emma best hobby paracord gimble camera utility Features: - HMPE CORD LINE: Tensile Strength: 266lbs; Diameter: .03" (VERY THIN); Braided from 3 strands of high molecular polyethylene - ENHANCED COMPOSITION: Polymer abrasion resistant coating impregnated into the braid for added abrasion, corrosion and UV resistance. Low stretch, floats and can not be seen on night vision - Lengths Available: 25, 50, 100, 500, 1000 feet; Color: Black; Breaking Strength: 260LB - Ideal for survival and emergency kits, perimeter trip wire alarm, bug out bag, EDC, wildlife mitigation, craft and hobby - Made in the USA === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 260LB Black HMPE Utility Cord

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Black HMPE 260LB Utility Cord

anthropic.title_differentiation: 266LB Tensile Strength, UV Resistant, Made In USA, Lightweight Braided, EDC And Survival

openai.title_differentiation: 266Lb Tensile Strength, Low Stretch, UV Resistant, Abrasion Coated, Made In USA, Floats, 3 Strand Braided
